recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Kindergarten Cop 2
recommendations.overview: Assigned to recover sensitive stolen data, a gruff FBI agent goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher, but the school's liberal, politically correct environment is more than he bargained for.

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2

recommendations.title: Assassin Club
recommendations.overview: In this world of contract killers, Morgan Gaines is the best of the best. When Morgan is hired to kill six people around the world, he soon discovers all the targets are also assassins unknowingly hired to kill each other.

recommendations.title: Nemesis

recommendations.title: Debug
recommendations.overview: Six young computer hackers sent to work on a derelict space freighter, are forced to match wits with a vengeful artificial intelligence that would kill to be human.

recommendations.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.
